title: rubus schleicheri var. spinosellus
intro: Rubus schleicheri var. spinosellus, also known as the prickly raspberry, is a variant of the Rubus schleicheri plant species, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This shrub has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and inflammatory conditions due to its high content of anthocyanins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Rubus schleicheri var. spinosellus include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders, such as diarrhea and ulcers. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
